horizon.title: Steering Horizon
horizon.subtitle: Define the temporal scope of your financial vision.

strategy.title: Strategic Parameters
strategy.subtitle: Configure your dashboard targets.
strategy.ef_help: Defines the multiplier used for the 'Emergency Fund' gauge on your Steering. Generally, 3 to 6 months of current expenses are recommended.

vault.title: The Vault
vault.subtitle: Ownership and portability of your data.
vault.import_help: Strady CSV format only. Duplicates will be automatically managed.

maintenance.title: System Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: Destructive actions and logout.
maintenance.reset_starter_help: Deletes your data and reinstalls the standard family configuration (recommended for testing).
maintenance.reset_wipe_help: PERMANENTLY deletes your entire workspace. Start from scratch.

notifications.horizon_invalid: Start date must be before end date.
notifications.horizon_boundary: End date cannot exceed the functional limit ({{boundary}}).

tour.title: New to Strady?
tour.subtitle: Let our assistant show you the key features in 1 minute.

confirm.delete_wealth: Do you want to permanently delete {{label}} and all its history?
confirm.edit_recurring: You are modifying a recurring transaction. This will delete the old series and create a new one with these parameters. Continue?
confirm.edit_tx: Are you sure you want to modify this transaction?
confirm.delete_recurring: Do you want to delete this recurring transaction AND all linked transactions? (Irreversible action)
confirm.delete_tx: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?
confirm.logout: Are you sure you want to log out?
confirm.reset_all: Are you sure you want to delete ALL accounts and ALL transactions? This action is irreversible.
confirm.reset_tx: Are you sure you want to delete ALL transactions? Accounts will be kept. This action is irreversible.
confirm.factory_starter: WARNING: This will delete ALL your current data to reinstall the Starter Pack. Are you sure?
confirm.factory_wipe: IRREVERSIBLE ACTION: This will PERMANENTLY delete all your data (Accounts, Transactions, Categories). You will start from scratch. Are you sure?
confirm.close_month: Are you sure you want to close the month of {{month}}? This action is irreversible.
confirm.delete_cat: Are you sure you want to delete this category?
confirm.delete_acc: Are you sure you want to delete this account and ALL its associated transactions?
